Product Id: This is a monthly price index published quarterly. Quarterly indexes as published in The Daily are available in table 18-10-0260.

This table replaces table 18-10-0040 which was archived with the release of January to June 2020 data, as a result of changes to the base period and geographical coverage, as well as availability of price indexes by building type. Data for the new index series are available starting in January 2019. Data for periods prior to January 2019 were obtained by linking the new total commercial rents services price index with the total historical index series published in table 18-10-0040.
All geographic regions are based on the 2016 Census boundaries.
Territories include Yukon, Northwest Territories and Nunavut.
